title: What Kathak Taught Me About Writing Code
excerpt: The discipline of daily riyaaz, the precision of taal, and the storytelling of abhinaya — turns out, classical dance and software engineering have more in common than you'd think.

title: Why COBOL Isn't Dead (And What That Means for AI)
excerpt: 95% of ATM transactions still run on COBOL. Instead of declaring it dead, maybe we should figure out what that means for the AI era.
